title: Dynamic Composition in Full Stack Development
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of dynamically composing a web page by assembling separate components on the server or client side.
relationships: Client sends a request to the Web Server -> Application Logic processes the request and fetches data from the Database -> Data is passed to the Template Engine -> Template Engine dynamically composes the final page by merging data with templates -> Final Rendered HTML is sent back to the Client
